resources:
Aziz Lumière Settings
/* user preferences strings */ main_job_interval 5000 Service interval Interval (in milliseconds) between each luminosity processing
aggregate_sensor_values "true Aggregate sensor values Derive brightness from multiple sensor reads
buffer_size 6 Aggregation buffer size
min_aggregation_window 1000 Minimum aggregation window Minimum time (in milliseconds) to wait for sensor events before brightness calculation
max_standard_deviation 1.5 Buffer standard deviation threshold Buffer standard deviation threshold to reach before brightness calculation (the lower the stricter)
standard_deviation_fluctuation_margin 4.0 Standard deviation fluctuation margin Margin (scaled to the overall buffer values height) to add to the standard deviation threshold. It increases the acceptable threshold as higher illuminance values fill the buffer
